items.title: From Data to Viz — Selecting Chart Types
items.author: Yan Holtz
items.note: Interactive decision tree from data shape to chart family; aligns with the six-type framework taught here.

items.title: Graphical Perception: Theory, Experimentation, and Application to the Development of Graphical Methods
items.author: William S. Cleveland and Robert McGill
items.note: Foundational ranking of visual encodings; supports bar-over-pie and position-based comparison guidance.

items.title: Exploratory Data Analysis
items.author: John W. Tukey
items.note: Classic EDA text establishing histograms, box plots, and scatter as hypothesis-generating tools.

items.title: Fundamentals of Data Visualization
items.author: Claus O. Wilke
items.note: Open-access book on choosing encodings and avoiding misleading charts; strong companion to this topic.
